isolation.browserContext: fresh dedicated agent-browser session auth-user-sync-isolation-1417 (reset during troubleshooting retries)

toolsUsed: local read-only postgres query via node

assertions.title: Clerk user is synced to Supabase users table on first login

steps.action: Open /sign-up and submit unique email/password for a new user
steps.expected: Sign-up completes and user is redirected to authenticated app
steps.observed: Clerk sign-up remained in disabled 'Loading' state on /sign-up and never completed

steps.action: Capture browser diagnostics and network activity
steps.observed: Console showed Private Access Token challenge activity with 401 and network showed repeated Cloudflare challenge/PAT requests

steps.action: Run read-only DB query: SELECT id,email,name,created_at FROM users WHERE email = <new_email>
steps.expected: New users row exists with matching Clerk ID/email/name
steps.observed: Query returned no rows for attempted sign-up email

evidence.consoleErrors: Private Access Token challenge warning and 401 observed (see foundation/auth-user-sync-isolation/VAL-AUTH-017-browser-console-after-signup-retry.txt)
evidence.network: Cloudflare Turnstile/PAT challenge requests observed; no completed sign-up outcome (see foundation/auth-user-sync-isolation/VAL-AUTH-017-network-after-signup-retry2.txt and foundation/auth-user-sync-isolation/VAL-AUTH-017-db-query-userA-retry.json)

assertions.issues: Blocked by external Clerk/Cloudflare challenge behavior in this automation environment; prerequisite successful first login could not be completed to validate DB sync contract.

assertions.title: User data isolation between accounts

steps.action: Attempt to create User A and sign in
steps.expected: Authenticated User A session available for recipes/pantry checks
steps.observed: User A sign-up stalled in loading; sign-in returned 'Couldn't find your account'

steps.action: Attempt to create User B and establish separate authenticated session
steps.expected: Authenticated User B session available for cross-account comparison
steps.observed: User B sign-up also stalled in loading with challenge behavior

steps.action: Navigate to /recipes and /pantry for comparison flow
steps.expected: User A data visible only to A; hidden from B
steps.observed: Could not authenticate either account; protected routes redirected to sign-in

evidence.consoleErrors: PAT challenge warnings/401 and sign-in 422 observed (see foundation/auth-user-sync-isolation/VAL-AUTH-028-browser-console-signup-attempt.txt)
evidence.network: Observed Clerk sign-in/sign-up related traffic plus Cloudflare challenge flows; authentication did not complete (see foundation/auth-user-sync-isolation/VAL-AUTH-028-network-signup-attempt.txt and foundation/auth-user-sync-isolation/VAL-AUTH-028-db-check-users.json)

assertions.issues: Blocked by inability to establish two authenticated accounts in the assigned environment, so user-to-user recipes/pantry isolation could not be executed through the real UI flow.

frictions.description: Clerk sign-up repeatedly entered indefinite loading due Cloudflare Private Access Token/Turnstile challenge behavior in headless automation.
frictions.resolution: Retried with fresh session resets and multiple unique emails; issue persisted.

blockers.description: External auth challenge prevented successful account creation/sign-in in this isolated run, blocking both user-sync confirmation and multi-account isolation validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Used dedicated fresh browser session, retried sign-up with multiple unique emails, retried sign-in, captured diagnostics, and performed read-only DB verification queries.

summary: Tested 2 assigned assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked due external auth challenge preventing authenticated test setup.
